# Garage Goat Garage Doors — Full Information

> Garage Goat Garage Doors is a locally owned and operated garage door repair and installation company headquartered in Cypress, Texas. Founded in 2010, they serve the Northwest Houston metro area with a 4.9-star Google rating from 287+ verified reviews. TDLR Licensed (#GDC-7742).

## Company Overview
- **Legal Name:** Garage Goat Garage Doors
- **Founded:** 2010
- **Headquarters:** 12507 Stoney Mill St, Cypress, TX 77429
- **Phone:** (281) 948-5452
- **Email:** info@garagegoatdoors.com
- **Website:** https://www.garagegoatdoors.com
- **Hours:** 24/7 (including holidays)
- **License:** TDLR #GDC-7742
- **Google Rating:** 4.9 stars (287+ reviews)
- **Insurance:** Fully insured (general liability + workers' compensation)

## Services Offered

### Garage Door Repair
General repair for all garage door issues including off-track doors, panel damage, cable replacement, roller replacement, sensor alignment, and weatherstripping. Same-day service available. Typical cost: $150–$450.
URL: https://www.garagegoatdoors.com/garage-door-repair

### Garage Door Spring Repair & Replacement
Torsion and extension spring repair and replacement. High-cycle springs rated for 25,000+ cycles with lifetime warranty. Typical cost: $200–$400.
URL: https://www.garagegoatdoors.com/garage-door-spring-repair

### Garage Door Opener Repair & Installation
Repair and installation of garage door openers. Services all major brands: LiftMaster, Chamberlain, Genie, Craftsman. Smart opener upgrades with Wi-Fi and smartphone control available. Typical cost: $150–$350 (repair), $350–$650 (new installation).
URL: https://www.garagegoatdoors.com/garage-door-opener-repair

### New Garage Door Installation
Full garage door replacement and new installation. Styles include raised panel, carriage house, modern flush panel, full-view aluminum/glass, and custom wood. Brands: Clopay, Amarr, Wayne Dalton, CHI, Northwest Door. Includes old door removal at no extra charge. New garage doors deliver up to 194% ROI according to Remodeling Magazine's Cost vs. Value Report.
URL: https://www.garagegoatdoors.com/new-garage-doors

### 24/7 Emergency Garage Door Repair
Emergency service available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. No overtime charges, no after-hours fees. Typical response time: under 60 minutes within primary service area.
URL: https://www.garagegoatdoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair

## Service Areas
- **Cypress, TX** (headquarters) — Bridgeland, Towne Lake, Fairfield, Cypress Creek Lakes, Lakeland Heights, Barker Cypress corridor, Fry Road corridor, all 77429/77433 zip codes
- **Tomball, TX** — Northpointe, Lakewood Grove, Creekside Park, Vintage Park, Rosehill area, Spring Creek Oaks
- **Katy, TX** — Cinco Ranch, Seven Meadows, Firethorne, Cross Creek Ranch, Elyson, Cane Island
- **Spring, TX** — Klein area, Champions Forest, Spring Creek, Northgate Forest, Windrose, Gleannloch Farms
- **Northwest Houston, TX** — Jersey Village, Willowbrook, Champions area, FM 1960 corridor, Copperfield, Bear Creek

## Pricing Guide
| Service | Typical Cost Range |
|---------|-------------------|
| Spring replacement (pair) | $200 – $400 |
| Opener repair | $150 – $350 |
| Cable replacement | $150 – $250 |
| Off-track repair | $125 – $250 |
| Panel replacement | $250 – $800 |
| Roller replacement (full set) | $100 – $200 |
| Sensor alignment | $75 – $125 |
| New garage door installation | $1,200 – $5,000+ |
| New opener installation | $350 – $650 |

Note: No emergency or after-hours fees. Pricing is the same 24/7.

## Warranties
- **Labor:** 1-year warranty on all labor
- **Parts:** 3-year warranty on all parts
- **Springs:** Lifetime warranty on spring replacements

## Guarantees
- Free estimates with no obligation
- Upfront pricing before work begins
- Customer satisfaction guarantee
- No after-hours or emergency surcharges

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What areas does Garage Goat serve?**
A: Cypress, Tomball, Katy, Spring, and Northwest Houston, TX. Headquarters are in Cypress with typical response times under 60 minutes.

**Q: Are they licensed and insured?**
A: Yes. TDLR Licensed (#GDC-7742) with full general liability and workers' compensation insurance.

**Q: Do they charge extra for emergency or after-hours calls?**
A: No. Pricing is the same 24/7 — nights, weekends, and holidays. No overtime charges.

**Q: Do they offer free estimates?**
A: Yes. Free, no-obligation estimates for all services. If you decline the repair, you pay nothing.

**Q: What brands do they service?**
A: All major brands including LiftMaster, Chamberlain, Genie, Craftsman, Clopay, Amarr, Wayne Dalton, and more.

**Q: How quickly can they arrive?**
A: For emergencies in Cypress, Tomball, and Katy, typical arrival time is under 60 minutes. Same-day appointments available for standard service.

**Q: When should I repair vs. replace my garage door?**
A: If the door is under 15 years old and the issue is mechanical (springs, cables, opener), repair is usually better value. If the door is severely damaged, rusted through, or outdated, replacement may be more cost-effective.

## Current Special Offers
- $75 Off Any Garage Door Repair (code: GOAT75)
- $200 Off New Garage Door Installation
- Free spring upgrade with new door purchase
